payload.label: pillow
payload.long_description: Rectangular bed pillow with a cream/beige base and multiple horizontal gray-blue stripes of varying widths on a woven fabric cover; left-edge fringe is visible and the pillow appears slightly flattened and fills most of the crop, suggesting it is close to the camera (approximately 0.5 m away).
